task.title: Implement v2 wiki layout and migration
task.summary: V2 layout compatibility is implemented: `.wiki/views/**` is generated alongside legacy read models and bootstrap/rebuild understand the v2 views root.

goal.outcome: New and migrated repos use canonical knowledge/tasks/evidence plus generated views under the v2 structure without breaking legacy paths.
acceptance: V2 target paths are represented in config/templates.
Legacy `.wiki/roadmap.json` and current generated files remain readable during migration.
Migration or bootstrap creates the v2 directory shape safely.
Rebuild can populate v2 views while preserving current tool behavior.
non_goals: Remove all legacy paths in one release.
Rewrite every tool call to the final v2 paths immediately.

delta.desired: V2 layout makes canonical truth and `.wiki/views/**` read models explicit.
delta.current: Current layout mixes canonical files and generated read models under several top-level `.wiki` paths.
delta.closure: Bootstrap/migration and rebuild understand v2 paths with legacy compatibility.

acceptance_matrix.criterion: V2 target paths are represented in config/templates.
Legacy `.wiki/roadmap.json` and current generated files remain readable during migration.
Migration or bootstrap creates the v2 directory shape safely.
Rebuild can populate v2 views while preserving current tool behavior.

non_goals: Remove all legacy paths in one release.
Rewrite every tool call to the final v2 paths immediately.
